Props.S: Automatically balances performance with energy consumption on capable hardware.

MS.S: <CLASS NAME="CIM_ManagedElement"><QUALIFIER NAME="Abstract" TYPE="boolean" TOSUBCLASS="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="locale" TYPE="sint32" TOSUBCLASS="false"><VALUE>1033</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="UMLPackagePath" TYPE="string"><VALUE>CIM::Core::CoreElements</VALUE></QUALIFIER><PROPERTY NAME="Caption" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MaxLen" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>64</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="Description" TYPE="string"></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="ElementName" TYPE="string"></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="InstanceID" TYPE="string"></PROPERTY></CLASS>

<CLASS NAME="CIM_SettingData" SUPERCLASS="CIM_ManagedElement"><QUALIFIER NAME="UMLPackagePath" TYPE="string"><VALUE>CIM::Core::Settings</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="Abstract" TYPE="boolean" TOSUBCLASS="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="locale" TYPE="sint32" TOSUBCLASS="false"><VALUE>1033</VALUE></QUALIFIER><PROPERTY NAME="ElementName" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="Override" TYPE="string" TOSUBCLASS="false"><VALUE>ElementName</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="Required" TYPE="boolean" OVERRIDABLE="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="InstanceID" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="key" TYPE="boolean" OVERRIDABLE="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="Override" TYPE="string" TOSUBCLASS="false"><VALUE>InstanceID</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY></CLASS>

<CLASS NAME="Win32_PowerPlan" SUPERCLASS="CIM_SettingData"><QUALIFIER NAME="UMLPackagePath" TYPE="string"><VALUE>CIM::Core::Settings</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="dynamic" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="Locale" TYPE="sint32" TOSUBCLASS="false"><VALUE>1033</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="provider" TYPE="string"><VALUE>PowerWmiProvider</VALUE></QUALIFIER><PROPERTY NAME="IsActive" TYPE="boolean"><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><METHOD NAME="Activate" TYPE="boolean"><QUALIFIER NAME="implemented" TYPE="boolean" TOSUBCLASS="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></METHOD></CLASS>
